input.command:
# Generate a keyfile for internal auth
KEYFILE=$(openssl rand -base64 756)
echo "$KEYFILE" | head -c 20
echo "..."
echo "Keyfile length: ${#KEYFILE}"

# Create the keyfile secret
KEYFILE=$(openssl rand -base64 756)
kubectl create secret generic mongodb-keyfile \
  --from-literal=keyfile="$KEYFILE" \
  -n mongodb

# Create admin password secret
kubectl create secret generic admin-user-password \
  --from-literal=password="admin123password" \
  -n mongodb

# Create app password secret  
kubectl create secret generic app-user-password \
  --from-literal=password="app123password" \
  -n mongodb

kubectl get secrets -n mongodb
input.description: Create MongoDB secrets for keyfile and user passwords

input.command:
cat <<'EOF' | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: mongodb-init
  namespace: mongodb
data:
  mongod.conf: |
    net:
      port: 27017
      bindIp: 0.0.0.0
    replication:
      replSetName: "mongodb-replica"
    security:
      authorization: enabled
      keyFile: /etc/mongodb/keyfile/keyfile
    storage:
      dbPath: /data/db
  init-replica.sh: |
    #!/bin/bash
    set -e

    HOST=$(hostname -f)
    echo "Starting init on $HOST"

    # Only run initiation on pod 0
    if [[ "$HOST" != mongodb-replica-0* ]]; then
      echo "Not pod 0, skipping initiation"
      exit 0
    fi

    echo "Waiting for all three mongod processes to be ready..."
    for i in 0 1 2; do
      until mongosh --host mongodb-replica-$i.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local \
        --port 27017 --eval "db.adminCommand('ping')" --quiet 2>/dev/null; do
        echo "Waiting for mongodb-replica-$i..."
        sleep 3
      done
      echo "mongodb-replica-$i is up"
    done

    echo "Initiating replica set..."
    mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval "
      rs.initiate({
        _id: 'mongodb-replica',
        members: [
          { _id: 0, host: 'mongodb-replica-0.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017' },
          { _id: 1, host: 'mongodb-replica-1.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017' },
          { _id: 2, host: 'mongodb-replica-2.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017' }
        ]
      })
    " --quiet

    echo "Waiting for PRIMARY to be elected..."
    until mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval "
      var status = rs.status();
      var primary = status.members.find(m => m.stateStr === 'PRIMARY');
      if (!primary) throw new Error('No PRIMARY yet');
      print('PRIMARY found: ' + primary.name);
    " --quiet 2>/dev/null; do
      echo "Waiting for PRIMARY..."
      sleep 3
    done

    echo "Creating admin user..."
    mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval "
      db = db.getSiblingDB('admin');
      db.createUser({
        user: 'admin-user',
        pwd: 'admin123password',
        roles: [
          { role: 'root', db: 'admin' }
        ]
      });
    " --quiet

    echo "Creating app user..."
    mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 \
      -u admin-user -p admin123password --authenticationDatabase admin \
      --eval "
        db = db.getSiblingDB('appdb');
        db.createUser({
          user: 'app-user',
          pwd: 'app123password',
          roles: [
            { role: 'readWrite', db: 'appdb' }
          ]
        });
      " --quiet

    echo "Init complete."
EOF
input.description: Create ConfigMap with mongod config and init script

input.command:
cat <<'EOF' | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica-svc
  namespace: mongodb
  labels:
    app: mongodb-replica
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: mongodb-replica
  ports:
  - name: mongodb
    port: 27017
    targetPort: 27017
EOF
input.description: Create headless service for MongoDB StatefulSet

input.command:
cat <<'EOF' | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica
  namespace: mongodb
spec:
  serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mongodb-replica
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: mongodb-replica
    spec:
      initContainers:
      - name: fix-keyfile-perms
        image: mongo:7.0
        command:
        - bash
        - -c
        - |
          cp /etc/mongodb/keyfile-secret/keyfile /etc/mongodb/keyfile/keyfile
          chmod 400 /etc/mongodb/keyfile/keyfile
          chown 999:999 /etc/mongodb/keyfile/keyfile
        volumeMounts:
        - name: keyfile-secret
          mountPath: /etc/mongodb/keyfile-secret
        - name: keyfile
          mountPath: /etc/mongodb/keyfile
      containers:
      - name: mongodb
        image: mongo:7.0
        command:
        - mongod
        - --config
        - /etc/mongodb/mongod.conf
        ports:
        - containerPort: 27017
          name: mongodb
        volumeMounts:
        - name: data
          mountPath: /data/db
        - name: config
          mountPath: /etc/mongodb/mongod.conf
          subPath: mongod.conf
        - name: keyfile
          mountPath: /etc/mongodb/keyfile
        readinessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - bash
            - -c
            - mongosh --port 27017 --eval "db.adminCommand('ping')" --quiet 2>/dev/null
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 12
        livenessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - bash
            - -c
            - mongosh --port 27017 --eval "db.adminCommand('ping')" --quiet 2>/dev/null
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          failureThreshold: 6
      volumes:
      - name: keyfile-secret
        secret:
          secretName: mongodb-keyfile
      - name: keyfile
        emptyDir: {}
      - name: config
        configMap:
          name: mongodb-init
          items:
          - key: mongod.conf
            path: mongod.conf
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - metadata:
      name: data
    spec:
      accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 1Gi
EOF

echo "Waiting for pods to start..."
kubectl rollout status statefulset/mongodb-replica -n mongodb --timeout=180s
input.description: Wait for StatefulSet to roll out

description: Wait for StatefulSet to roll out
